final_prompt.prompt:
Create an epic battle scene illustration of a dragon and knight (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "奇幻" (fantasy) aesthetic — references in the spirit of Frank Frazetta's heroic fantasy illustration, 1980s Dragonlance book cover art, Studio Ghibli's Mononoke epic scale; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs an epic, dynamic framing — exact angle and dramatic tension is yours
Subject: must include a dragon breathing fire and a knight charging with shield
Scene/backdrop: must include a burning castle and lightning-streaked sky
Lighting/mood: needs an epic, dramatic atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
